verses.text: 'Let brotherly love continue.' Entertain strangers, for some 'have entertained angels unawares'; remember the prisoners and the suffering. Love on. Faith shows itself in kindness to others.
'Let brotherly love continue.' Entertain strangers, for some 'have entertained angels unawares'; remember the prisoners and the suffering. Love on. Faith shows itself in kindness to others.
'Let brotherly love continue.' Entertain strangers, for some 'have entertained angels unawares'; remember the prisoners and the suffering. Love on. Faith shows itself in kindness to others.
Marriage is honourable; let your conduct be 'without covetousness,' content, for He said, 'I will never leave thee, nor forsake thee.' Be content. God's presence frees us from fear and greed.
Marriage is honourable; let your conduct be 'without covetousness,' content, for He said, 'I will never leave thee, nor forsake thee.' Be content. God's presence frees us from fear and greed.
Marriage is honourable; let your conduct be 'without covetousness,' content, for He said, 'I will never leave thee, nor forsake thee.' Be content. God's presence frees us from fear and greed.
Remember your leaders, following their faith; 'Jesus Christ the same yesterday, and to day, and for ever.' Unchanging Lord. Christ never alters, though teachers pass.
Remember your leaders, following their faith; 'Jesus Christ the same yesterday, and to day, and for ever.' Unchanging Lord. Christ never alters, though teachers pass.
Be not carried about with strange doctrines; the heart is established 'with grace,' not meats. True nourishment. Grace, not ritual, steadies the soul.
Be not carried about with strange doctrines; the heart is established 'with grace,' not meats. True nourishment. Grace, not ritual, steadies the soul.
Be not carried about with strange doctrines; the heart is established 'with grace,' not meats. True nourishment. Grace, not ritual, steadies the soul.
Jesus suffered 'without the gate'; let us go forth to Him, bearing His reproach, seeking 'one to come.' Outside the camp. We share His shame, looking for the city to come.
Jesus suffered 'without the gate'; let us go forth to Him, bearing His reproach, seeking 'one to come.' Outside the camp. We share His shame, looking for the city to come.
Jesus suffered 'without the gate'; let us go forth to Him, bearing His reproach, seeking 'one to come.' Outside the camp. We share His shame, looking for the city to come.
By Him offer 'the sacrifice of praise... the fruit of our lips'; to do good and share, 'God is well pleased.' Living sacrifice. Praise and kindness are the worship God delights in.
By Him offer 'the sacrifice of praise... the fruit of our lips'; to do good and share, 'God is well pleased.' Living sacrifice. Praise and kindness are the worship God delights in.
Obey them that have the rule over you, for they 'watch for your souls'; pray for us. Honour leaders. Submit to faithful shepherds and uphold them in prayer.
Obey them that have the rule over you, for they 'watch for your souls'; pray for us. Honour leaders. Submit to faithful shepherds and uphold them in prayer.
Obey them that have the rule over you, for they 'watch for your souls'; pray for us. Honour leaders. Submit to faithful shepherds and uphold them in prayer.
'Now the God of peace, that brought again from the dead our Lord Jesus,' make you perfect to do His will. Benediction. The risen Shepherd equips His people for every good work.
'Now the God of peace, that brought again from the dead our Lord Jesus,' make you perfect to do His will. Benediction. The risen Shepherd equips His people for every good work.
Bear this word of exhortation; Timothy is set at liberty; 'Grace be with you all. Amen.' Farewell. He closes with greetings and grace.
